summary: Executed backend and frontend regression for Royal Spark storefront update. All requested API and UI flows passed on public preview URL.
action_items: No blocking fixes required from this test cycle.
When moving to live commerce, replace MOCKED seeded catalog with Shopify-backed sync and retest end-to-end purchase flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend API usage is correct: process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix.
All tested interactive controls include data-testid and were automatable.
Catalog/product data and Shopify readiness are MOCKED/local-seeded by design in this iteration.
seed_data_creation: No new seed dataset created; used existing backend seeded catalog. Test bespoke inquiries were created via API/UI submits.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated requested flows: homepage theme/assets, shop categories including Rings/Grills, Grills filter, product pages for royal-solitaire-spark-ring and diamond-smile-grill-set, cart add flow, bespoke submit, and required catalog APIs.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in requested scope during this run.
